Lab Meeting Presentation on Thomas et al (2019)

April 9, 2020

I gave a presentation on the paper “Gaze bias differences capture individual choice behaviour” by Thomas et al (2019). Since I am working on a project about predicting food choice and I believe that eye-tracking data contains a lot of information about an individual’s choice, the paper was fascinating. I look forward to applying the findings in my research. :)

P.S. Due to the COVID-19, we are doing an online lab meeting!

Date: 09 April, 2020
Event: CCS lab meeting
Location: Seoul, South Korea
Paper: Link
Slides: Download pdf
